- Don't refactor Y
- Don't modify Z

- [ ] Criterion 1

- Database: <!-- Changes needed? -->

## 🤖 AI Instructions (If applicable)

<!-- How should AI tools be used for this task? -->

Use existing components and patterns.
Don't refactor unrelated code.
Follow the existing architecture.

**Important**: This is an atomic task. If it's bigger than 2 days, split it!
